answer_en:
Transversus Abdominis m. (Not visible on right side)
Tenses the anterior wall and assists in compressing the contents of the abdomen (required during straining)

details: Tenses the anterior wall and assists in compressing the contents of the abdomen (required during straining)

title: Anterior View of Abdominal Wall
